blockingIssues: frontend/Sembla/WidgetDisplay.lean renders edge endpoints and markers at node centers, then draws radius-25 node circles over them, obscuring arrowheads and violating the directed-graph requirement.
frontend/README.md still claims there are no external Lake dependencies despite the new pinned ProofWidgets dependency.
summary: Build, parity, pure-props architecture, cursor registration, exact graph JSON tests, probability/prior tests, and manual instructions pass, but the directed SVG arrows are visually obscured and README dependency setup is contradictory.
